channel.title: Fixxit Pros | Home Services
channel.description: Recent content on Fixxit Pros | Home Services

item.title: Contact Us | Get a Free Quote
Cookie Policy | Fixxit Pros
item.description:
Last Updated: January 1, 2025

This Cookie Policy explains how Fixxit Pros (“we,” “us,” or “our”) uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our website at fixxitpros.com (the “Site”). This policy should be read alongside our Privacy Policy.

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or smartphone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to site owners.

item.title: HVAC Services | Fixxit Pros
item.description:
Expert HVAC Services for Your Home

Your home’s heating and cooling system is one of its most critical components. When it fails, you need help fast — and you need a professional you can trust. Fixxit Pros connects you with licensed, background-checked HVAC technicians in your local area, so you can get the service you need without the stress of vetting contractors on your own.

Services We Connect You With

Our HVAC contractor network covers a full range of heating and cooling services:

item.title: Looking for Work | Join Fixxit Pros
Mowing & Yard Work | Fixxit Pros
item.description:
Professional Lawn Care & Yard Work

A well-maintained lawn increases your home’s curb appeal and value. But keeping up with mowing, trimming, and seasonal yard work takes time and equipment. Fixxit Pros connects you with reliable, local lawn care professionals who take pride in their work and deliver consistent results.

Lawn Care Services We Connect You With

Our lawn care and yard work professionals offer a full range of outdoor services:

item.title: Plumbing Services | Fixxit Pros
item.description:
Professional Plumbing Services

A plumbing problem can go from an inconvenience to a disaster fast. Whether you’re dealing with a dripping faucet, a backed-up drain, or a burst pipe, Fixxit Pros connects you with licensed plumbers in your area who can handle any job — big or small.

Plumbing Services We Connect You With

Our network of licensed plumbing professionals covers every type of residential plumbing need:

  • Emergency Plumbing — Burst pipes, sewage backups, and flooding — available when you need help most
  • Leak Detection & Repair — Find and fix hidden leaks before they cause water damage
  • Drain Cleaning & Unclogging — Kitchen drains, bathroom drains, main sewer line clearing
  • Water Heater Installation & Repair — Traditional tank, tankless, and heat pump water heaters
  • Toilet Installation & Repair — Running toilets, clogs, flapper replacement, full installs
  • Faucet & Fixture Installation — Sinks, showers, bathtubs, and outdoor faucets
  • Pipe Repair & Replacement — Old galvanized, copper, PEX, and PVC systems
  • Garbage Disposal Install & Repair — Replacement units and troubleshooting
  • Sewer Line Services — Inspection, repair, and replacement
  • Water Filtration Systems — Whole-house and under-sink filtration

Why Trust a Fixxit Pros Plumber?

We only connect homeowners with plumbers who have cleared our vetting process:

item.title: Privacy Policy | Fixxit Pros
item.description:
Last Updated: January 1, 2025

Fixxit Pros (“we,” “us,” or “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website at fixxitpros.com (the “Site”) and use our services.

Please read this policy carefully. If you disagree with its terms, please discontinue use of the Site.

1. Information We Collect

Information You Provide Directly

We collect information you voluntarily provide to us, including when you:
